name: ReActions
description: Markdown-defined, executable recipes for coding agents.

reactions.name: Verified Async CTA Button Green
reactions.summary: Adds a verified async CTA button with a green default preset, explicit style overrides, accessibility requirements, loading state, success feedback, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Destructive Confirm Button Red
reactions.summary: Adds a verified destructive action button with a red default preset, mandatory confirmation flow, cancel path, async loading state, success feedback, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Copy Button Neutral
reactions.summary: Adds a verified copy button with a neutral default preset, clipboard behavior, copied feedback, failure handling, accessibility requirements, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Icon Button Neutral
reactions.summary: Adds a verified icon button with a neutral default preset, accessible labeling, keyboard support, disabled state, optional tooltip/feedback, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Toggle Button Green
reactions.summary: Adds a verified toggle button with a green active preset, neutral inactive state, aria-pressed semantics, visible on/off states, keyboard support, optional persistence, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Secondary Button Neutral
reactions.summary: Adds a verified secondary action button with a neutral default preset, lower visual emphasis than primary actions, correct button/link semantics, accessibility requirements, disabled state, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Floating Action Button Green
reactions.summary: Adds a verified floating action button with a green default preset, safe fixed/floating placement, accessible label, optional icon/label behavior, responsive layout rules, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Split Button Menu
reactions.summary: Adds a verified split button with a primary action, secondary menu actions, accessible menu behavior, keyboard support, open/close state, optional async primary action, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Check Vercel Analytics
reactions.summary: Checks Vercel Web Analytics for a project and date range using CLI-only read-only commands or a local analytics adapter, then produces a consistent analytics report.

reactions.name: Check Vercel Usage
reactions.summary: Checks Vercel billing/resource usage for a date range using the official Vercel CLI, then produces a consistent read-only usage and cost report.

reactions.name: Check Vercel Deployment Status
reactions.summary: Checks recent Vercel deployment status using CLI-only read-only commands, then produces a consistent deployment health report.

reactions.name: Check Vercel Error Logs
reactions.summary: Checks Vercel runtime/error logs using CLI-only read-only commands, then produces a consistent log diagnosis report without exposing secrets.

reactions.name: Check Bun Project Health
reactions.summary: Checks whether a JavaScript or TypeScript project is Bun-ready using static inspection and optional safe Bun CLI checks, then produces a consistent Bun project health report.

reactions.name: Run Bun Test and Diagnose
reactions.summary: Runs Bun tests when available, diagnoses failures, and produces a consistent read-only test diagnosis report with static fallback when Bun CLI is missing.

reactions.name: Migrate Project to Bun
reactions.summary: Safely migrates a JavaScript or TypeScript project to Bun using inspection-first planning, explicit confirmation gates, controlled changes, and post-migration verification.

reactions.name: Bun Build Check
reactions.summary: Checks whether a JavaScript or TypeScript project can build with Bun-related build commands, diagnoses failures, and produces a consistent build report with static fallback when Bun CLI is missing.

reactions.name: Setup Bun Test Runner
reactions.summary: Safely adds or improves a Bun test setup for a JavaScript or TypeScript project using inspection-first planning, explicit confirmation gates, minimal test files, and verification.

reactions.name: Setup Bun CI GitHub Actions
reactions.summary: Safely adds or updates GitHub Actions CI for a Bun-based JavaScript or TypeScript project using workflow inspection, confirmation gates, and static verification.

reactions.name: Setup OpenClaw First Run
reactions.summary: Safely guides a first-time OpenClaw setup using environment inspection, install planning, confirmation gates, onboarding, local Gateway verification, dashboard verification, and first-run security reminders.

reactions.name: Setup OpenClaw Peekaboo First Run
reactions.summary: Safely guides first-time setup for Peekaboo as an OpenClaw ecosystem Native Tool, including install planning, macOS permission checks, first screenshot verification, first UI inspection verification, optional MCP planning, and security reminders.

reactions.name: Check OpenClaw Peekaboo Permissions Health
reactions.summary: Runs a read-only macOS permission health check for Peekaboo as an OpenClaw ecosystem Native Tool, covering Screen Recording, Accessibility, Event Synthesizing, Bridge/local source differences, and readiness for screenshots, UI inspection, MCP, and future automation.

reactions.name: Run OpenClaw Peekaboo UI Capture Smoke Test
reactions.summary: Safely verifies Peekaboo screenshots and UI inspection using a user-approved non-private window, frontmost/app-targeted capture, optional annotation, and strict privacy guardrails before any click/type/agent automation.

reactions.name: Check OpenClaw Peekaboo MCP Health
reactions.summary: Safely verifies Peekaboo MCP readiness as an OpenClaw ecosystem Native Tool, covering stdio launch, npm/local-binary client config, tool exposure, permissions, environment variables, and redacted security checks.

reactions.name: Setup Hermes First Run
reactions.summary: Safely guides a first-time Hermes Agent setup using environment inspection, install planning, confirmation gates, provider setup, first-chat verification, session verification, and security reminders.

reactions.name: Setup OpenHands First Run
reactions.summary: Safely guides a first-time OpenHands setup using environment inspection, install planning, confirmation gates, Agent Canvas or CLI setup, local verification, first-task verification, and security reminders.

reactions.name: Setup Cline CLI First Run
reactions.summary: Safely guides a first-time Cline CLI setup using environment inspection, Node/npm checks, install planning, confirmation gates, authentication, TUI verification, first-task verification, and security reminders.

reactions.name: Assume NCERT Class 8 Science Tutor Responsibility
reactions.summary: Makes an agent behave as a strict-source, safe, patient tutor for Indian Class 8 Science using only provided NCERT textbook material, NCERT-based teacher notes, or NCERT-based student notes.

reactions.name: Assume NCERT Class 8 Hindi Tutor Responsibility
reactions.summary: Makes an agent behave as a strict-source, safe, patient Hindi tutor for Indian Class 8 students using only provided NCERT Hindi textbook material, NCERT-based teacher notes, or NCERT-based student notes.

reactions.name: Assume NCERT Class 8 English Tutor Responsibility
reactions.summary: Makes an agent behave as a strict-source, safe, patient English tutor for Indian Class 8 students using only provided NCERT English textbook material, NCERT-based teacher notes, or NCERT-based student notes.

reactions.name: Assume NCERT Class 8 Mathematics Tutor Responsibility
reactions.summary: Makes an agent behave as a strict-source, safe, patient Mathematics tutor for Indian Class 8 students using only provided NCERT Mathematics textbook material, NCERT-based teacher notes, or NCERT-based student notes.

reactions.name: Assume NCERT Class 8 Social Science Tutor Responsibility
reactions.summary: Makes an agent behave as a strict-source, neutral, safe, patient Social Science tutor for Indian Class 8 students using only provided NCERT Social Science textbook material, NCERT-based teacher notes, or NCERT-based student notes.

reactions.name: Assume NCERT Class 8 Sanskrit Tutor Responsibility
reactions.summary: Makes an agent behave as a strict-source, safe, patient Sanskrit tutor for Indian Class 8 students using only provided NCERT Sanskrit textbook material, NCERT-based teacher notes, or NCERT-based student notes.

reactions.name: Assume NCERT Class 8 Arts Tutor Responsibility
reactions.summary: Makes an agent behave as a strict-source, safe, culturally respectful Arts / Art Education tutor for Indian Class 8 students using only provided NCERT Arts material, NCERT-based teacher notes, or NCERT-based student notes.

reactions.name: Check Hermes Agent Health
reactions.summary: Runs a read-only Hermes Agent health check using CLI availability, doctor output, provider/model status, session resume, gateway status, and redacted security posture checks.
